sourcesContent:
export default {
  welcomeBack: 'Welcome back',
  enterDetails: 'Please enter your details',
  username: 'Username',
  usernamePlaceholder: 'Admin',
  password: 'Password',
  passwordPlaceholder: 'Enter your password',
  rememberMe: 'Remember for 30 days',
  forgotPassword: 'Forgot password?',
  loginAccount: 'Log in',
  loginFailEmpty: 'Please enter your username and password.',
  loginFailCheck: 'Login failed. Please check your username and password.',
  loginFailNetwork: 'Unable to connect to the backend server.',
}
